basicDetails.schemeName: Supply of School Stationery, Socks, Shoes, School Bag, etc. to all Students of Std I to VIII
basicDetails.schemeShortTitle: SUPPLY OF STATIONERY, SOCKS, SHOES, SCHOOL BAG

state.label: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

references.title: Supply Of School Stationery, Socks, School Bag, Etc To All Students Of Std I To VIII

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: Provision of essential stationery items, socks, shoes and school bags to students in classes I to VIII of Government schools. This includes notebooks, a geometry box, writing instruments, an eraser, a sharpener, along with footwear and a school bag. It ensures that every child, regardless of their socio-economic background, has the basic physical tools required for a productive learning environment. The scheme covers all students from Standard I to VIII.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Reduces financial burden on parents by providing a comprehensive school kit. 2. Provision of free stationery kits includes school bag, pairs of socks, school shoes and a complete stationery set (notebooks, pens/pencils etc). 3. Providing shoes and socks promotes better foot health and hygiene for students commuting to school. 4. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Supply of School Stationery, Socks, Shoes, School Bag, etc. to all Students of Std. I to VIII studying in Govt Schools

children.text: Provision of essential stationery items, socks, shoes and school bags to students in classes I to VIII of Government schools. This includes notebooks, a geometry box, writing instruments, an eraser, a sharpener, along with footwear and a school bag. It ensures that every child, regardless of their socio-economic background, has the basic physical tools required for a productive learning environment. The scheme covers all students from Standard I to VIII.
1. Reduces financial burden on parents by providing a comprehensive school kit.
2. Provision of free stationery kits includes school bag, pairs of socks, school shoes and a complete stationery set (notebooks, pens/pencils etc).
3. Providing shoes and socks promotes better foot health and hygiene for students commuting to school.
4. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs.
Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md: 1. No separate application is required. 1. Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a student. 2. The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th. 3. The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.

children.text: 1.	The applicant should be a student.
2.	The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th.
3.	The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
